text: peteros shelicha yeshu'a hamashicha el-toshevey tefutsot panetos galateya qapodeqiya aseya uvitineya
hanivecharim mida'at elohim haav miqedem beqidush harucha el-mishema'at yeshu'a hamashicha veel-hazayat damo chesed veshalom lemakhebir yiheyu lakhem
barukh haelohim avi adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha asher kerov rachamayv chazar veyalad otanu letiqeva chaya bahaqamat yeshu'a hamashicha me'im hametim
lenachala asher lo tishachet velo tegoal velo tibol hatsefuna lakhem bashamayim
hashemurim be'oz elohim 'al-yad haemuna lateshu'a ha'atida lehigalot le'et-qets
asher bah tagilu atem hamite'atsevim 'ata me'at lefi hatsorekh bemasot shonot
lema'an timatse emunatekhem hamezuqaqa yeqara harebe min-hazahav haoved hatsaruf baesh litehila ulekhavod uletifeeret behitegalot yeshu'a hamashicha
asher ahavetem velo reitem vaasher taaminu vo 'ata veeynekhem roim oto uvekhen tagilu besimecha mefoara 'atsema misaper
laset 'eqev emunatekhem teshu'a lenafeshoteykhem
et hateshu'a asher 'aleyha chaqeru vedareshu haneviim hanibeim 'al-hachesed hatsafun lakhem
lacheqor lada'at mah-zu veey-zu ha'et asher hodi'ah rucha hamashicha asher beqirebam behagido merosh et 'inuyey hamashicha veet-hagedulot asher achareyhem

venigela lahem asher lo lenafesham ki im-lanu hayu meshameshim badevarim hahem asher hugad lakhem 'ata 'al-pi hamevaserim etekhem berucha haqodesh hashalucha mishamayim devarim asher maleakhey elohim chamedu lehasheqif el-tokham
lakhen chigeru mateney sikhelekhem hite'oraru veqauu vekhal-nafeshekhem lachesed asher yevoakhem behitegalot yeshu'a hamashicha
kiveney mishema'at al-titenahagu kataaot asher hiteavitem be'od heyotekhem biveli-da'at
ki im-heyu qedoshim bekhal-darekheykhem kaasher haqore etekhem qadosh hu
ki 'al-ken katuv viheyitem qedoshim ki qadosh ani
veim-tiqereu av lelohim hashofet biveli mas fanim kema'aleley ish vaish hitehalekhu-na veyirea bimey megureykhem
mipeney sheyode'im atem ki lo-vedavar nifesad lo vekhesef velo vezahav nifedeytem miderekh havelekhem asher hanechaletem meet avoteykhem
ki im-bedam yaqar shel-se tamim sheeyn-bo mum bedam hamashicha
hanoda' merosh lifeney mosedot tevel venigela beacharit hayamim lema'anekhem
hamaaminim 'al-piv belohim asher heqim oto me'im hametim vayiten-lo khavod lema'an heyot emunatekhem tiqeva lelohim
zaku et-nafeshoteykhem 'al-yedey harucha beshame'akhem beqol haemet leachava sheeyn bah chanupa vaahavetem ish et-re'ehu ahava 'aza belev tahor
kanoladim shenit lo mizera' nishechat ki im-mizera' lo yishachet bamaamar shel-elohim hachay vehaqayam le'olam
ki khal-basar chatsir vekhal-kevod ish ketsits hasade
yavesh chatsir navel tsits udevar yeho yaqum le'olam vehu hadavar asher busar lakhem
ve'ata hasiru meitekhem kal-resha' vekhal-mirema vachanupa veqinea vekhal-lashon ra'
ukhe'olalim asher miqarov noladu hiteauu lechalav hasikheli vehazakh lema'an tigedelu-vo lateshu'a
im-amenam te'ametem ki-tov haadon
asher nigashetem elayv el-even chaya asher maasu-vah beney-haadam vehi nivechara viqara lelohim
vegam-atem kaavanim chayot niveneytem lemishekan harucha likhehunat qodesh leha'alot zivechey-rucha leratson lelohim beyeshu'a hamashicha
veze hu sheamar hakatuv hineni yisad betsion even pina even bochan viqara vehamaamin bah lo yevosh
lakhen lakhem hamaaminim hi even hayeqar aval lasorarim haeven asher maasu habonim hayeta lerosh pina uleeven negef uletsur mikheshol
vehem nikheshelu ya'an lo shame'u ladavar velazot gam-no'adu
veatem hinekhem zera' nivechar mamelekhet kohanim vegoy qadosh ve'am segula lema'an tesaperu tehilot haqore etekhem mechoshekh el-oro hanifela
asher lefanim lo-'am heyitem ve'ata 'am elohim vaasher lefanim lo ruchamu ve'ata meruchamim
chavivay azehirekhem kegerim vetoshavim hinazeru mitaaot habasar hamitegarot banafesh
veheytivu darekekhem bagoyim lema'an yabitu el-ma'aseykhem hatovim vikhabedu et-haelohim beyom hapequda tachat asher cherefu etekhem kefo'aley aven
vehikane'u lekhal-pequdat adam lema'an haadon im-lamelekh karauy larosh
im-lamoshelim karauy lasheluchim meito leniqemat po'aley aven velitehilat 'osey tov
ki khen retson elohim sheta'asu hatov vetisekeru et-pi ivelet haanashim asher eyn-bam da'at
kachafeshim velo-kheilu hayeta lakhem hachufesha lemikhese hara'a ki im-ke'avedey elohim
nahagu khavod bekhal-ish ehevu et haachim yireu et-elohim kabedu et hamelekh
ha'avadim hikane'u lifeney adoneykhem bekhal-yirea lo lifeney hatovim veha'anavim bilevad ki im-gam-lifeney ha'iqeshim
ki chesed hu laish ki-yiseba' mamerorim vi'une chinam lema'an da'at haelohim
ki im-techeteu usevaletem makot egerof mah-titehalalu aval im-te'unu usevaletem ba'asotekhem hatov chesed hu milifeney elohim
ki lazot niqeretem ki gam-hamashicha 'una va'adekhem vehisheir lakhem mofet lalekhet be'iqevotayv
asher lo chamas 'asa velo mirema befiv
asher shama' cherepato velo heshiv na'ana velo ga'ar ki im-masar dino lashofet tsedeq veet-chatotenu hu nasa bigeviyato 'al-ha'ets
lema'an nicheye latsedaqa acharey chadalenu min-hachataim
asher bachavurato nirepa lakhem ki heyitem ketson ovedot ve'ata shavetem el-haro'e peqid nafeshoteykhem
vekhen atena hanashim hikana'ena lifeney va'aleykhen lema'an asher-yiqanu beeyn-omer udevarim 'al-yedey ma'asey hanashim mi sheeynam shome'im ladavar
bireotam ki titsena'ena lekhet beyirea
ufeerekhen al-yehi mibachuts bemachelefot se'ar va'adi zahav ulevishat machalatsot
ki im-haadam hatsafun penima berucha 'anava vehasheqet asher lo yikhele hu yaqar be'eyney elohim
ki khen hiteqashetu lefanim gam-hanashim haqedoshot hameyachalot lelohim behikane'an lifeney va'aleyhen
kesara asher shame'a beqol averaham vatiqera-lo adon asher aten heyiten lah levanot ba'asotekhen hatov velo tirena mipachad
vekhen atem haanashim shevu 'imahen bitevuna ki-kheli rafe haisha utenu-lah kavod ki gam-lahen yesh-cheleq benachalat matenat hachayim pen-tikaleu mitefiloteykhem
vesof davar heyu khulekhem lev echad ba'aley chemela ohavey haachim rachamanim veshifeley rucha
al-teshalemu ra'a tachat ra'a velo cherepa tachat cherepa ki im-tevarekhu mipeney sheyode'im atem shelazot niqeretem shetireshu et-haberakha
ki haish hechafets chayim ohev yamim lireot tov yitsor leshono mera' usefatayv midaber mirema yasur mera' veya'aseh-tov yevaqesh shalom veyiredefehu
ki-'eyney yeho el-tsadiqim veazenayv el-shave'atam
ufeney yeho be'osey ra'
umi yare'a lakhem im-teqaneu la'asot hatov
veashereykhem gam im-te'unu lema'an hatsedaqa raq-moraam lo-tireu velo ta'aritsu
et-yeho elohim oto taqedishu bilevavekhem viheyu nekhonim tamid lehashiv davar ba'anava uveyirea lekhal-mevaqesh meitekhem cheshebon hatochelet asher beqirebekhem
rucha nakhon yehi lakhem lema'an yevoshu hamenaatsim darekekhem hatova vamashicha lehaleshin etekhem kefo'aley aven
ki tov lakhem asher te'unu biretson elohim ba'asotekhem hatov mishete'unu ba'asotekhem ra'
ki gam-hamashicha met pa'am achat 'al-chatoteynu hatsadiq be'ad haresha'im leqarev otanu el-haelohim humat babasar vayechi varucha
uvekhen halakh vayiqera laruchot asher bamishemar
asher lefanim lo heeminu kaasher chika elohim beorekh apo bimey nocha behe'asot hateva asher nimeletu eleyha me'atim vehem shemone nefashot min-hamayim
vehu demut hatevila asher ka'et toshi'a gam-etekhem lo lehasir cheleat habasar ki im-lisheal-lanu meet elohim rucha shelema 'al-yedey haqamat yeshu'a hamashicha
asher 'avar hashamayema vayeshev limin elohim vayikane'u mipanayv hamaleakhim vehareshuyot vehagevurot
ve'ata kaasher 'una hamashicha ba'adenu babasar ken heyu gam-atem mezuyanim bada'at hahi ki hame'une vabasar chadal lachato
lema'an asher lo ticheyu 'od letaaot beney adam ki im-liretson elohim kal-yemey heyotekhem 'od babasar
ki rav lanu 'asot kechefets hagoyim bayamim harishonim yemey lekhetenu bedarekhey zima uvetaaot kesoveey yayin vezolaley vasar verodefey shekhar veto'avot 'avodat haelilim
ve'al-zot temehim hema umegadefim ki lo-tarutsu 'imahem liheyot shetufim bezima kemohem
asher yitenu cheshebon lifeney he'atid lishepot hachayim vehametim
ki 'al-ken hitebaseru gam-hametim lema'an yidonu vabasar kiveney-adam veyicheyu barucha kederekh elohim
hen qets hakol qarev lakhen heyu tsenu'im ve'erim lehitepalel
veqodem kal-davar ehevu ish et-achiv ahava 'aza ki 'al-rov pesha'im tekhase haahava
heyu mearachim ish et-re'ehu biveli telunot
ish ish kematan hachesed asher qibel ta'azeru ish lere'ehu kesokhenim memunim 'al-chasedey elohim harabim
hamedaber yedaber imerey-el veha'ozer ya'azor mitokh hachayil asher chanano elohim lema'an yikaved elohim bakol 'al-yedey yeshu'a hamashicha asher lo hakavod veha'oz le'olemey 'olamim amen
chavivay bevoakhem betokh kur 'oni lema'an nasotekhem al-na titemahu keilu qara etekhem miqere zar
ki im-simechu 'al-asher cheleq lakhem be'inuyey hamashicha lema'an gam-tisemechu veta'aletsu behigalot kevodo
im-yecharafu etekhem lema'an-shem hamashicha ashereykhem ki nacha 'aleykhem rucha hakavod vehagevura rucha elohim etselam menoaf hu veetselekhem nikhebad
ki al-ye'une ish mikem kerotsecha o kheganav o-khefo'el aven o-khenikhenas bitechum sheeyno shelo
vekhi-ye'une keachad hameshichiyim al-yevosh ki im-yode lelohim 'al-hadavar haze
ki 'et hachel hamishepat mibeyt elohim veim-mimenu rishona mah-tiheye acharit hamamerim et-besorat elohim
hen tsadiq kime'at lo yivashe'a af ki-rasha' vechote
lakhen gam-hame'unim kiretson elohim yafeqidu et-nafeshoteyhem beyad elohim habore haneeman veyosifu la'asot hatov
et-hazeqenim asher beqirebekhem azehir ani hazaqen 'amitam ve'ed 'inuyey hamashicha vegam-chaver lakavod he'atid lehigalot
re'u et-'eder haelohim asher tachat yedekhem vehashegichu 'aleyhem lo veones ki im-binedava kiretson elohim velo 'eqev betsa' ra' ki im-benefesh chafetsa
af-lo kerodanim benachalat yeho ki im-liheyot mofet latson
uvehofa'at sar haro'im tiseu 'ateret hakavod asher lo tibol
vekhen gam-atem hane'arim hikane'u lifeney hazeqenim vechigeru khulekhem shifelut rucha behikane'a ish lere'ehu ki elohim laletsim yalits vela'anavim yiten-chen
hashepilu nafeshekhem tachat yad-elohim hachazaqa lema'an yeromem etekhem be'ito
hashelikhu 'alayv kal-yehavekhem ki hu yideag lakhem
hite'oraru sheqodu ki yerivekhem hasatan mitehalekh keareye shoeg umevaqesh et asher yevale'a
va'amadetem negedo chazaqim baemuna ude'u ki-'inuyim kaele bau gam-'al-acheykhem asher ba'olam
velohey khal-hachesed asher qara etekhem likhevodo hanitsechi bamashicha yeshu'a acharey 'unotekhem me'at hu yashelim etekhem vichazeq vigaber viyased
lo hakavod veha'oz le'olemey 'olamim amen
beyad silevanos haach haneeman ki khen echeshov kataveti aleykhem bidevarim me'atim lehazehir etekhem uleha'id ki chesed haelohim haze asher 'amadetem bo emet hu
qehilatekhem asher bevavel hanivechara itekhem umareqos beni shoalim lishelomekhem
shaalu ish et-re'ehu leshalom bineshiqat ahava shalom lakhem kulekhem asher bamashicha yeshu'a amen ﻿
